title: turnera oculata
intro: Turnera oculata, also known as Sleepy Grass, is a plant species within the Turnera genus, native to tropical regions. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Turnera oculata include its ability to aid in sleep, reduce anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of the plant are often used in teas, supplements, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote relaxation and overall well-being.
